title: An Ace and Four Queens
writer: Michael Logan, Georges Bardawil, Gérard Carlier
actors: Roger Hanin, Sylva Koscina, Catherine Allégret
plot: Hakim Gregory escapes from prison by killing a number of guards, and returns to his hide-out abroad, to lead again his gang of drug trafficking and contract murders. Layton of the Secret Service must discover, and arrest him. The ...
